title: Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers

seo.title: How to Make Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers — Easy Turkish Recipe
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make authentic Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers. This easy Turkish recipe includes step-by-step instructions, tips, and serving ideas.

easy Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers recipe
authentic Turkish Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers

seo.h1: Authentic Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers Recipe
h2Headings: What is Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers?

seo.imageAlt: Authentic Turkish Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers recipe
seo.imageCaption: Delicious homemade Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers — a beloved Turkish classic

description: Tavuk Sis is a beloved Turkish classic featuring tender, marinated chicken skewers grilled to perfection. The chicken is typically marinated in a mixture of yogurt, olive oil, and aromatic spices, resulting in incredibly flavorful and juicy meat. Served hot, these skewers are a staple at Turkish tables, often accompanied by rice, salad, and flatbread.

instructions.title: Prepare the Marinade
instructions.text: In a large bowl, combine the yogurt, olive oil, tomato paste, minced garlic, paprika, oregano, cumin, salt, black pepper, and lemon juice. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.

instructions.title: Marinate the Chicken
instructions.text: Add the cubed chicken breast to the marinade. Toss to ensure all chicken pieces are evenly coated. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or preferably overnight, to allow the flavors to deepen.

instructions.title: Soak Skewers and Prepare Vegetables
instructions.text: While the chicken marinates, soak wooden skewers in water for at least 30 minutes to prevent them from burning on the grill. Cut bell peppers and red onion into roughly 1-inch pieces that will fit well on the skewers.

instructions.title: Assemble the Skewers
instructions.text: Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto the soaked skewers, alternating with bell pepper and red onion pieces. Leave a small space between each piece to ensure even cooking.

instructions.title: Preheat Grill or Pan
instructions.text: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat (around 400°F / 200°C) or a large grill pan over medium-high heat. Lightly oil the grill grates or pan to prevent sticking.

instructions.title: Cook the Skewers
instructions.text: Place the assembled skewers on the hot grill or grill pan. Cook for 15-20 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through, golden brown, and slightly charred on all sides. Ensure internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).

instructions.title: Rest and Serve
instructions.text: Once cooked, remove the skewers from the heat and let them rest for 5 minutes before serving. This helps the juices redistribute, keeping the chicken tender and moist. Serve hot with pilaf, a fresh salad, and warm flatbread.

tips: For the most tender chicken, marinate for at least 4 hours, or even better, overnight. The yogurt helps to tenderize the meat beautifully.
Dont overcrowd the skewers. Leave a little space between the chicken and vegetables to ensure even cooking and better charring.
Serve Tavuk Sis immediately after cooking with a side of traditional Turkish bulgur pilaf, a refreshing shepherd salad (çoban salatası), and some warm lavash bread.
article: Tavuk Sis Chicken Skewers is a beloved Turkish Chicken Recipes dish enjoyed across Turkey. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
